title: keraselma squamosum
intro: Keraselma squamosum, also known as the squamose keraselma, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Keraselma squamosum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Keraselma squamosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
